tasks.subject: US-X-001: Feed loads in under 2 seconds [frontend-designer]
tasks.description:
Epic: epic-5-infrastructure
Spec File: .spec/prd/subscriptions-redesign/tasks/epic-5-infrastructure/US-X-001.md
Priority: P0
Type: FEATURE
Status in spec: To Do
Dependencies: Epic 2

================================================================================
TASK: US-X-001 - Feed loads in under 2 seconds
================================================================================

TASK_TYPE: FEATURE
STATUS: To Do
TDD_PHASE: RED
CURRENT_AC: AC-1
PRIORITY: P0
EFFORT: S
TYPE: DEV
ITERATION: 1

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BACKGROUND
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Problem:** Feed may take too long to render on initial load, blocking user engagement.

**Why it matters:** Users abandon apps that take more than 2 seconds to show content.

**Current state:** Feed screen exists but lacks performance optimization (FlatList tuning, skeleton states).

**Desired state:** Feed renders visible content within 2 seconds of screen mount.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (TDD Beads)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AC-1: Feed renders within 2 seconds
  GIVEN: User opens feed
  WHEN: Screen loads
  THEN: Feed visible in under 2 seconds

  TDD_STATE: [ ] RED  [ ] VERIFY_RED  [ ] GREEN  [ ] VERIFY_GREEN  [ ] REFACTOR
  TEST_FILE: components/subscriptions/__tests__/SubscriptionFeedScreen.perf.test.tsx
  TEST_FUNCTION: feedRendersWithinTwoSeconds

Quality Criteria:
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Lint passes with zero errors
- [ ] Type check passes
- [ ] RED evidence in Linear comments

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
READING LIST
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. components/subscriptions/SubscriptionFeedScreen.tsx
   - Lines: ALL
   - Focus: Current FlatList setup, data loading pattern

2. components/subscriptions/FeedCard.tsx
   - Lines: ALL
   - Focus: Card render cost, memoization

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
GUARDRAILS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WRITE-ALLOWED (explicit file list):
- components/subscriptions/SubscriptionFeedScreen.tsx (MODIFY) - FlatList performance props
- components/subscriptions/FeedSkeleton.tsx (NEW) - skeleton loading state
- components/subscriptions/__tests__/SubscriptionFeedScreen.perf.test.tsx (NEW)

WRITE-PROHIBITED:
- convex/** - backend changes separate
- app/** - routing changes separate

MUST:
- [ ] Use FlatList with initialNumToRender, maxToRenderPerBatch, windowSize
- [ ] Render skeleton states immediately while data loads
- [ ] One test per acceptance criterion

MUST NOT:
- [ ] Block feed rendering waiting for all images
- [ ] Add features beyond AC requirements

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CODE PATTERN (Reference)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```typescript
<FlatList
  data={findings}
  keyExtractor={(item) => item.url}
  renderItem={({ item }) => <FeedCard item={item} />}
  initialNumToRender={10}
  maxToRenderPerBatch={10}
  windowSize={5}
  ListEmptyComponent={isLoading ? <FeedSkeleton count={5} /> : <EmptyState />}
/>
```

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AGENT ASSIGNMENT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Implementation Agent**: frontend-designer
**Rationale**: React Native FlatList performance optimization

**Review Agent**: react-native-ui-reviewer
**Rationale**: Validates RN performance patterns

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
EVIDENCE GATES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gate 1: All Tests Pass
  Command: pnpm vitest run
  Expected: Exit 0

Gate 2: Type Check
  Command: pnpm tsc --noEmit
  Expected: Exit 0

Gate 3: Lint
  Command: pnpm eslint --fix
  Expected: Exit 0

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEPENDENCIES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Depends On:
- Epic 2 (Multimedia Card Stream) - cards must exist

Blocks:
- None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
NOTES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Focus on perceived performance (skeletons) as much as actual load time
- Performance profiling required for verification

================================================================================

tasks.subject: US-X-002: 60fps scroll performance [frontend-designer]
tasks.description:
Epic: epic-5-infrastructure
Spec File: .spec/prd/subscriptions-redesign/tasks/epic-5-infrastructure/US-X-002.md
Priority: P0
Type: FEATURE
Status in spec: To Do
Dependencies: Epic 2

================================================================================
TASK: US-X-002 - 60fps scroll performance
================================================================================

TASK_TYPE: FEATURE
STATUS: To Do
TDD_PHASE: RED
CURRENT_AC: AC-1
PRIORITY: P0
EFFORT: S
TYPE: DEV
ITERATION: 1

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BACKGROUND
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Problem:** Feed scroll may drop frames with rich media cards, degrading UX.

**Why it matters:** Janky scroll feels broken and unprofessional.

**Current state:** FlatList exists but may lack scroll optimization props.

**Desired state:** 60fps maintained during scroll with no frame drops.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (TDD Beads)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AC-1: Smooth 60fps scroll
  GIVEN: User scrolls feed
  WHEN: Scroll gesture fires
  THEN: 60fps maintained, no frame drops

  TDD_STATE: [ ] RED  [ ] VERIFY_RED  [ ] GREEN  [ ] VERIFY_GREEN  [ ] REFACTOR
  TEST_FILE: components/subscriptions/__tests__/SubscriptionFeedScreen.perf.test.tsx
  TEST_FUNCTION: scrollMaintainsSixtyFps

Quality Criteria:
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Lint passes with zero errors
- [ ] Type check passes
- [ ] RED evidence in Linear comments

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
READING LIST
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. components/subscriptions/SubscriptionFeedScreen.tsx
   - Lines: ALL
   - Focus: FlatList props, removeClippedSubviews, getItemType

2. components/subscriptions/FeedCard.tsx
   - Lines: ALL
   - Focus: React.memo usage, render cost

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
GUARDRAILS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WRITE-ALLOWED (explicit file list):
- components/subscriptions/SubscriptionFeedScreen.tsx (MODIFY) - scroll optimization
- components/subscriptions/FeedCard.tsx (MODIFY) - React.memo wrapper
- components/subscriptions/__tests__/SubscriptionFeedScreen.perf.test.tsx (NEW|MODIFY)

WRITE-PROHIBITED:
- convex/** - backend changes separate

MUST:
- [ ] Use removeClippedSubviews={true}
- [ ] Stable keyExtractor
- [ ] Memoize card components

MUST NOT:
- [ ] Cause frame drops during scroll
- [ ] Use ScrollView instead of FlatList

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AGENT ASSIGNMENT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Implementation Agent**: frontend-designer
**Rationale**: React Native scroll performance optimization

**Review Agent**: react-native-ui-reviewer
**Rationale**: Validates RN performance patterns

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
EVIDENCE GATES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gate 1: All Tests Pass
  Command: pnpm vitest run
  Expected: Exit 0

Gate 2: Type Check
  Command: pnpm tsc --noEmit
  Expected: Exit 0

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEPENDENCIES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Depends On:
- Epic 2 (Multimedia Card Stream) - cards must exist

Blocks:
- None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
NOTES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Flipper profiling recommended for verification
- getItemType helps FlatList recycle views efficiently

================================================================================
